text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I head to the cafeteria to find Ines Fujin walled in
by taiyaki.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Oh, hey there, Trainer. Hehe, don't mind me. I'm
just having a solo taiyaki party! ♪

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Yup. So what happened is, at the taiyaki place
where I work...

text_block_list.name: Taiyaki Stall Manager
text_block_list.text:
...Well, this is a problem. I messed up the numbers
and ordered way too many ingredients.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Oh no... But hey, there's always a silver lining!
How about letting all the part-timers practice
with those extra ingredients? You can teach them
how to make taiyaki like you do, Boss!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Nothing would go to waste, and everyone would
learn something—it's two birds with one stone!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
And that's how I ended up with a bunch of these
taiyaki practice leftovers from work!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Mmm, they're all jam-packed with red bean
paste. ♪ Time to dig in!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Ines Fujin gleefully reaches for her first taiyaki.
choice_data_list: You've earned those, so eat up.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
...Urk. Y-yeah, maybe this portion's too much for
one person. Red bean paste is pretty sugary...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I was looking forward to eating what I'd rustled
up, but I have to learn how much is too much.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Guess I'll just give these away! I can have another
taiyaki party and invite everyone!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Heya-hey! Listen up, everybody! I've got some delicious taiyaki right here, and just for today, it's totally free!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Oh! And I'll tell you the taiyaki place that made
these, so if you think they're delish you can go
get some more!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After the party, the taiyaki stall goes on to gain a
legion of new regulars from the academy.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I will! Stuff always tastes that extra bit delicious
when you make it yourself!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I got better at grilling taiyaki, and now my
tummy's full up too... This is bliss! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
By the time Ines Fujin is done happily eating all
the taiyaki, there's not a single crumb left.
